series_metadata.series_title: Certification Testing and Personnel Qualification Forms
series_metadata.series_description: This includes support information including personnel test and correspondence. TE FORMS are used to sample identification when submitted to the lab for testing. [i.e. information from the TE form is transferred to CMS then CMS creates a Sample ID number which can be used to track the sampling process from start to finish].

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: on shared electronic database (Site Manager) permanently
